subcodes.title: Words to Edward Getsinger et al, spoken around 1915-01-26
subcodes.first_line: No obstacle should be placed before any soul which might prevent it from finding the truth.... The ones in real authority are known by their humility... In this day every one must be tested
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @importance of authoritative interpretation, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spirit and form in the administration, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
